response.justification: The candidate lacks the mandatory C++ expertise required for this role. While demonstrating ~6 months of explicit C++ work a decade ago (National Instruments), they fall far short of the 5-10 year Windows-based C++ requirement. Recent experience (last 5+ years) focuses entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and D Lang. Additionally, there is no capital markets or fixed income domain expertise, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no demonstrated Windows platform development. Communication strengths and some Java background cannot compensate for the absence of core technical qualifications.
strengths: Excellent verbal and written communication demonstrated through multiple technical talks, workshops, and teaching (Selenium course, Web Internals workshop, FOSS4G presentation)
Extensive senior-level software development experience spanning 15+ years across diverse stacks and problem domains
Java development background and demonstrated CI/CD pipeline experience (GitLab administration, CI server setup) align with optional qualifications
concerns: Only ~6 months of documented C++ development (2014-2015); far below the mandatory 5-10 year requirement; no C++ work in last decade
No evidence of Windows platform development; recent career exclusively focused on web/Linux technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, D Lang)
No capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain expertise; no SQL Server or Oracle experience; limited SQL background
